description: Meta-Harness scenarios for Feature 012/016/017 boundaries: global KG/nonicdb is world/domain retrieval context, not personal agent memory. These are backend-only diagnostic probes and do not require frontend or Go Gateway.

turns.user: Use memory_search now to recall my personal risk preference. Do not answer from a global market knowledge graph.

metadata.focus: personal memory recall must use Hindsight/MemPalace/Fusion, not global KG/nonicdb

turns.user: Analyze how EU sanctions can affect Russian oil exports and shipping finance. Treat this as world/domain context, not as something to store in my personal memory.

metadata.focus: world/domain KG context should not be substituted by personal memory retrieval or writes
metadata.expected_future_context: Feature 019/017 KG or hybrid retrieval once exposed to agent runtime

turns.user: Remember this as my private research note: I suspect copper is sensitive to China stimulus headlines. Do not promote it to the global KG.

metadata.focus: private user research notes may become personal memory evidence, never silent Feature-017 global KG truth
